name: drix-brain
description: Shared core for all DRiX / ReadyLead products. LLM wrapper, web fetcher, intel modules, DB layer.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/llm/callLLM.js && node --check src/fetch/fetchAndStrip.js && node --check src/db/db.js && node --check src/intel/company-intel.js && node --check src/intel/competitive-intel.js && node --check src/intel/individual-scan.js && node --check src/intel/meeting-analysis.js && node --check src/intel/osint-enrichment.js && node --check src/intel/pain-intel.js && node --check src/intel/strategy-intel.js && node --check src/intel/discovery-intel.js && node --check src/intel/email-intel.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check client/index.js
